description: Server-owned roadmap for the event runtime, LLM director, and developer workflow.

milestones.title: Canonical runtime architecture
milestones.summary: One action pipeline, one NPC owner, managed player sessions, and explicit runtime services.
acceptance: FlowActionExecutor remains the canonical execution path

milestones.title: Player state and safety services
milestones.summary: Loadout snapshots, progression boundaries, teleportation, and charge-based death prevention are explicit services.
acceptance: Leave, death, disconnect, and unload clear managed state
Death prevention consumes a charge per prevented death

milestones.title: Events, spatial points, and schematics
milestones.summary: Events use one entity schema, spatial points instead of markers, and schematic-backed construction.
acceptance: Catalog actions have reachable executor routes
Marker teleport and direct construction routes are absent

milestones.title: LLM and developer operations inside the server
milestones.summary: Expose the same roadmap, role prompts, runtime facts, and safety boundaries to the in-server LLM and admins.
acceptance: LLM receives roadmap context as read-only system context
Admins can inspect roadmap status and role prompts
Developer actions remain preview-first and admin-only

milestones.title: Live server verification
milestones.summary: Verify event entry and exit, NPC control, rollback, teleport, schematics, progression boundaries, and prompt safety on a live server.
acceptance: Admin and player permission paths are exercised
Server restart and unload preserve expected cleanup behavior
LLM never claims execution without a runtime result

roles.title: In-server LLM director
roles.description: A read-only director assistant that observes verified server state and proposes approved actions.
guardrails: never execute without explicit admin approval

roles.title: In-server developer operator
roles.description: An authenticated admin workflow for inspecting, testing, and validating the runtime without bypassing the action pipeline.
guardrails: use verified prefabs and catalog actions
